content.en:
Of course, even if he had such a good place, the extradimensional realm of the Silver Mountain would not dare to enter there often to contemplate enlightenment, otherwise it would be completely wasted.

Unless it is after completely breaking through the hopelessness, this will dare to enter the enlightenment for a period of time and enhance some extra-dimensional rule realms, so as to improve their strength.

It was precisely because the treasure land of the Silver Mountain Vein had such a big flaw that other forces did not capture it.

"That place of calamity made me comprehend the eighth dimensional will of the tower of the tribulation of the wind and the method of the will of the calamity, and the treasure land of the vein of the silver mountain can help me comprehend the extradimensional rules, both of which are related to the multidimensional tribulation!"

Ye Tian only realized at this moment that there were many opportunities for the Multi-Dimensional Tribulation, even if the places left over countless years had such benefits, the arrival of the real Multi-Dimensional Tribulation would inevitably have great opportunities.

It's no wonder that many Fourth Realms are counting on the Multidimensional Tribulation to impact the Fifth Realm, and maybe there will be a way to make the Fourth Realm 100% break through to the Fifth Realm during the Multidimensional Tribulation.

It's just that the detailed information about the Multidimensional Tribulation is only known to a very small number of Fourth Realms and forces, and other forces are not known and cannot be inquired about. 07

"Let's go to the Extreme of Silver Mountain first!"

Ye Tian immediately rushed over.

......

The Extreme of Silver.

Many extra-dimensional realms practiced here, and a large number of extra-dimensional realms opened up caves on the periphery of the Silver Mountain's vein, but none of the extra-dimensional realms set foot in the inner perimeter of the silver mountain's vein.

this day.

Ye Tian descended here, and immediately urged the ten-dimensional celestial body to try to cross the third dimension physically, thus entering the veins of the Silver Mountain.

However, the power of the Silver Mountain Vein permeates the third dimension and even higher.

Ye Tian was simply unable to advance in the third dimension, so he had no choice but to withdraw.

"It seems that the ten-dimensional celestial body is not omnipotent, and many places cannot be entered through the shuttle dimension!" Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he prepared to go in the light.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying aura on Ye Tian's body erupted, causing many of the Fourth Realms of the Silver Mountain to be alarmed.

"What do you mean, why did you break into my silver mountain?"

Angry voices came.

Ye Tian said lightly: "This seat wants to enter the depths of the vein of the Silver Mountain to comprehend the superdimensional rules, please let me go!"

"Presumptuous, where are you at the pinnacle of my silver mountain?"

A majestic figure emerged, and it was the White Armor Realm Lord who had the combat power of the Third Heaven Pass at the extreme of the Silver Mountain.

Seeing the White Armor Realm Lord coming, many Fourth Realms breathed a sigh of relief.

The White Armor Realm Lord is the fourth realm that has survived from the last multi-dimensional tribulation to the present, and he has terrifying strength, and with the help of the formation of the Silver Mountain's extreme, it is enough to resist the ordinary Fourth Heaven Pass powerhouse.

Ye Tian didn't speak, and started directly.

He didn't show the three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, but only showed the Ka Ye wisdom body, as well as the four-realm multi-dimensional mastery of the eight-dimensional tribulation light and the sand and gravel tribulation light, and the eighth-dimensional will mastery was also displayed.

Other aspects are also fully displayed, but they also give full play to the combat power of the fourth day pass.

Rumble!!!!

The gravel robbery light bombarded the body of this white armor realm master, directly shattering layer upon layer of formations, and even cracking a quasi-innate multidimensional supreme treasure armor on the opponent's body.

Then, the black mother sword descended, killing the opponent's soul will and leaving.

Bang!!!!

The aura on the White Armor Realm Lord's body instantly weakened, his entire body trembled, and his soul will had been slashed a lot, and he was already seriously injured at this moment.

"The fourth day is off the combat power!"

He was shocked and terrified.

The point is that Ye Tian actually comprehended the Eighth Dimensional Will Peerless Technique and the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Technique, this is the most terrifying Fourth Heaven Pass combat power!

He knew very well that as long as Ye Tian's cultivation was promoted and the realm of super-dimensional rules was raised, not to mention the fourth day pass, the fifth day pass, and the sixth day pass combat power would not be a problem.

Where can't you go to the fourth realm of demons like this, why did you fall in love with this treasure land of their silver mountain, this treasure land is not a good place, it will make the body of the fourth realm be eroded, and it will not be able to recover completely, and there is no hope for the fifth realm in the future!

He didn't dare ask.

He could only hurriedly beg for mercy at this moment: "Your Excellency spare your life, we are willing to let Your Excellency enter the depths of the vein of Yinshan to comprehend the extradimensional rules." "

Immediately, he immediately opened all the formations and let Ye Tian in.

The other Fourth Realms of the Silver Mountain Extreme also dare not stop it, who dares to stop such a terrifying Fourth Heaven Pass powerhouse?

The formation opened, and Ye Tian went straight to the depths of the veins of the Silver Mountain.

"In the years to come, no extradimensional realm will be allowed to disturb this seat!"

Ye Tian spoke.

"Yes!"

The White Armor Realm Lord did not dare to disobey.

After Ye Tian entered, many of the Fourth Realms of the Silver Mountain Extreme gathered together and discussed.

"Bai Kai, do you really let this guy enter there to practice?"

A Fourth Realm asked.

"Could it be that there is another way? Even if a few forces that are friendly with us don't dare to offend a fourth-day pass powerhouse, and this guy has comprehended the eighth-dimensional will mastery, as well as the four-dimensional multi-dimensional mastery, but the cultivation and extra-dimensional rules are so low, if the strength is hidden, the real strength is the fifth-day pass powerhouse, then we are even more helpless. "

"Forget it, let him go in and cultivate, anyway, there is no loss to my 063s. "

"That's right!"

After deliberating for a while, these Fourth Realms dispersed as if nothing had happened.

And they ordered the other Fourth Realms not to be allowed to enter the depths of the Silver Mountain Vein next, lest they offend Ye Tian.

......

Deep in the veins of the Silver Mountain.

Ye Tian came to a huge cave space.

There is a strange and distorted force here, as soon as he enters here, even Ye Tian's physical body is very uncomfortable, the skin seems to be slowly changing, and the wisps of skin seem to be about to turn into a strange black, and even the origin of the extradimensional realm in the body is about to be distorted.

Of course, this change is slow and not much of a problem in the short term.

"It's really weird, even I am affected, no wonder those big forces can't look down on it!"

Ye Tian continued to go deeper, he wanted to comprehend in the most core place, and the effect there would inevitably be the best.

"This is it!"

Ye Tian found a suitable position, and then began to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

Multi-dimensional wisdom light, soul vase, thirteen-fold blood-colored treasure lotus and other means are used to comprehend the rules of transcendence.

Airplanes!!!!!

Countless flashes of inspiration appeared, and many extra-dimensional rules appeared in front of me one by one.

In this state, Ye Tian's super-dimensional rule realm was rapidly improved.
